name: build-loop
description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. UI builds (uiTarget != null) get design-rule gates: mockup pre-flight scan, required UI scoring criteria, verbatim subagent-prompt template injection, design-rule static scanner in Validate + Fact-Check, AND visual validation (IBR/simulator render + DebugSeeder pattern for stateful screens) so rendering bugs that pass static rules still get caught. Includes NavGator / claude-code-debugger / logging-tracer bridges with standalone fallbacks. Opus 4.7 orchestrator, Sonnet execution, Haiku pattern-matching.
